title: melastoma malabathricum var. mariannum
intro: Melastoma malabathricum var. mariannum, also known as Mariannum or local term "Senduduk", is a type of plant that belongs to the Melastomataceae family. It is a traditional medicinal plant widely used in Southeast Asia for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mariannum include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory problems such as cough and asthma. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal preparations like tea, decoction, and ointment, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
